title: Retro Greek Dough Saganaki
description: A yeasty, pillowy Greek dish featuring sazon and a savory feta filling, served pan‑fried for a low‑glycemic snack.
instructions: In a bowl combine whole wheat flour, instant yeast, salt and sugar.
Add water and olive oil and mix until a shaggy dough forms.
Knead the dough on a lightly floured surface until smooth and elastic.
Cover the dough and let it rise at room temperature for 30 minutes.
Divide the dough into four equal portions and shape each into a flat oval.
Brush each portion with a mixture of lemon juice, oregano, garlic, and a splash of olive oil.
Place a slice of feta cheese in the center of each flat dough and roll up tightly.
Seal the edges by pinching them together.
Heat a small amount of olive oil in a skillet over medium heat and fry each roll until golden brown on both sides, about 3–4 minutes per side.
Serve the hot rolls warm, optionally with extra lemon wedges on the side.
